name: Oyster Corn Chowder Wip
recipeIngredient: Salt and white pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the orzo according to the directions on the package and set aside.
2. In a large saucepan, combine the chicken broth, parsley, leeks, prosciutto, salt, and white pepper. Simmer until the leeks are tender, about 2 minutes.
3. Add the corn, butter, cream (if using), and oysters with their liquor to the saucepan. Continue simmering for 3 to 5 minutes longer.
4. Stir in the cooked orzo and serve immediately.
5. Toast the corn in a dry skillet until toasted and browned, then remove from the pan before serving.
